name: team-topologies
description: Organize business and technology teams for fast flow using Skelton & Pais''s "Team Topologies". Use when the user mentions "team topologies", "Conway''s law", "platform team", "stream-aligned team", "team boundaries", "cognitive load", "how should we split teams", "org design", "who owns this service", "team dependencies", "reorg", or "teams keep stepping on each other". Also trigger when reorganizing engineering teams, aligning team and service boundaries, splitting a monolith and deciding owne
author: wondelai
